items.name: Salmon Nigiri
items.description: Melt-in-the-mouth fresh salmon over seasoned rice. Our most-ordered. Get it with the wasabi.

items.name: Tuna Nigiri
items.description: Premium tuna on seasoned rice. Clean, fresh, and perfectly sliced.

items.name: Tamago Nigiri
items.description: Sweet Japanese omelette over rice. A favorite for kids and first-timers.

items.name: Salmon Sashimi
items.description: Fresh salmon slices served with pickled ginger and wasabi. Pure flavor.

items.name: Unagi Maki Rolls
items.description: Grilled eel with cucumber, wrapped in nori and rice. Sweet and savory.

items.name: California Maki
items.description: Crab stick, avocado, and cucumber. The classic roll everyone loves.

items.name: Spicy Salmon Roll
items.description: Salmon with spicy mayo and cucumber. A kick of heat with every bite.

items.name: Tempura Soba
items.description: Celebrated for flavor and texture. Hot buckwheat noodles with crispy tempura shrimp.

items.name: Kitsune Udon
items.description: Thick wheat noodles in hot dashi with sweet fried tofu. Comfort in a bowl.

items.name: Salmon Shioyaki
items.description: Grilled salmon fillet with sea salt. Simple, healthy, delicious.

items.name: Saba Shioyaki
items.description: Grilled mackerel with a squeeze of lemon. Traditional Japanese flavor.

items.name: Teriyaki Chicken
items.description: Grilled chicken glazed with sweet teriyaki sauce. A crowd favorite.

items.name: Prawn Tempura
items.description: Crispy battered prawns served with tempura sauce. Light and crunchy.

items.name: Vegetable Tempura
items.description: Assorted seasonal vegetables in crispy tempura batter.

items.name: Soft Shell Crab
items.description: Crispy whole soft shell crab. The perfect crunch in every bite.

items.name: Chicken Teriyaki Don
items.description: Grilled chicken over steamed rice with teriyaki glaze and sesame.

items.name: Salmon Don
items.description: Fresh salmon cubes over rice with special sauce. A deconstructed favorite.

items.name: Chuka Kurage
items.description: Seasoned jellyfish salad. Crunchy, tangy, and refreshing.

items.name: Yakitori Moriawase
items.description: Assorted grilled chicken skewers. Perfect for sharing.

items.name: Monster Lunch Set
items.description: Ramen or rice bowl + 2 sushi + miso soup. Best value for hungry monsters.

items.name: Family Feast Platter
items.description: 4-person buffet-style platter. 20 pieces of assorted sushi and sides.
